meta.title: Dialogues on American Foreign Policy and World Affairs: Senator John McCain & Walter Russell Mead
meta.description: Senator John McCain and Walter Russell Mead discuss American foreign policy and world affairs. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
